items.statcast_observation: Bobby Witt Jr. produced the hardest tracked Royals contact: 117.2 mph at a 8.0 degree launch angle.
items.summary: The Royals lost to the Chicago White Sox, KC 1, CWS 2. Michael Wacha led the night, working 7.2 innings with 1 earned runs, 7 strikeouts and 1 walk. Bobby Witt Jr. supplied the loudest Royals contact at 117.2 mph.
items.title: Royals at White Sox Recap
